name: badge
title: Badge and Tag
description: Distinct primitives for compact status badges, static taxonomy tags, and removable filter tokens with a named 44px native button.
useWhen: Showing a short visible status, state, or count beside related content
Labelling content with a static category or taxonomy term
Representing an applied filter that the user can remove with an explicit named control
avoidWhen: The label initiates navigation or an action — use Link or Button instead of making a badge look clickable
Color would carry the only status meaning; every badge needs useful visible text
Many tags would compete for attention or make the page harder to scan
Removing a token would silently change important results; announce the updated result state nearby

keyboard: Badge and Tag are non-interactive spans and add no tab stops
Tab reaches each RemovableTag remove button in document order
Enter or Space activates the focused remove button using native button behavior
The remove button has a localized accessible name and a 44px minimum target
Status and category meaning is carried by visible text, never color alone
accessibility.targetSize: 44px project default for RemovableTag; not applicable to static Badge and Tag
